title: Prepare surface and prime repaired body panels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare surface and prime repaired body panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to prime a repaired body panel

pcs.text: Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.2 Interpret task instruction and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for removing paint and preparing surface1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for priming body panel according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.2 Interpret task instruction and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for removing paint and preparing surface1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for priming body panel according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.2 Interpret task instruction and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for removing paint and preparing surface1.4 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for priming body panel according to manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to prime a repaired body panel

elements.title: Prepare body panel for priming

pcs.text: Select and check tools, equipment and materials for priming body panel prior to use according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements2.2 Prepare vehicle body panel for priming according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.3 Inspect body panel according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Record body panel inspection results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check tools, equipment and materials for priming body panel prior to use according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements2.2 Prepare vehicle body panel for priming according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.3 Inspect body panel according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Record body panel inspection results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check tools, equipment and materials for priming body panel prior to use according to manufacturer specifications and safety requirements2.2 Prepare vehicle body panel for priming according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.3 Inspect body panel according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Record body panel inspection results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare body panel for priming

elements.title: Apply primer to body panel

pcs.text: Prepare primer for application according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements 3.2 Apply primer according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Apply primer to body panel without causing damage to body panel, components, tools or equipment3.4 Inspect body panel to ensure required application of primer to body panel3.5 Record body panel inspection results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare primer for application according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements 3.2 Apply primer according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Apply primer to body panel without causing damage to body panel, components, tools or equipment3.4 Inspect body panel to ensure required application of primer to body panel3.5 Record body panel inspection results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare primer for application according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements 3.2 Apply primer according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Apply primer to body panel without causing damage to body panel, components, tools or equipment3.4 Inspect body panel to ensure required application of primer to body panel3.5 Record body panel inspection results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply primer to body panel

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
